intro: Modern comfort, set within a building you simply cannot find anywhere else.

items.title: Elevator access
items.body: All four levels are served by an elevator for easy, accessible living.

items.title: Restored windows
items.body: Large historic windows reinstated throughout fill homes with natural light.

items.title: Original woodwork
items.body: Wood cupboards, doorframes, and shelving preserved and woven into many homes.

items.title: Heritage details
items.body: Original hallway lockers remain in place as a nod to the building's storied past.

items.title: Lofted layouts
items.body: Many apartments feature unique lofted ceilings created by the building's design.

items.title: Off-street parking
items.body: Dedicated parking is planned so residents won't have to park on the street.

items.title: Energy efficient
items.body: A full restoration brings modern systems and efficient appliances to every home.

items.title: Walkable downtown
items.body: Steps from downtown Jefferson, the Mahanay Bell Tower, shops, and the square.
